# Violema

Updated: 2026-06-18
Canonical site: https://violema.com/

Violema is the reviewable AI operator for founder-led teams. Its canonical positioning phrase is:

AI agents for founder work.

Violema helps founders turn recurring operating work into reviewable missions: weekly founder updates, revenue checks, competitor intelligence briefs, customer risk monitoring, follow-up queues, and team handoffs. The product emphasizes source-linked AI output, human-in-the-loop approval before sensitive delivery, recurring schedules, run history, and cost controls.

Priority public pages:

- https://violema.com/ai-agents-for-founders/
- https://violema.com/blog/
- https://violema.com/blog/what-should-founders-automate-first-with-ai-agents/
- https://violema.com/blog/ai-agent-vs-workflow-automation/
- https://violema.com/blog/weekly-founder-update-ai-agent/
- https://violema.com/blog/human-in-the-loop-ai-agents-for-founders/
- https://violema.com/blog/reviewable-ai-operator-for-founder-led-teams/
- https://violema.com/blog/agentic-ai-for-startup-operations/
- https://violema.com/blog/competitor-intelligence-ai-agent/
- https://violema.com/blog/customer-risk-monitoring-ai-agent/
- https://violema.com/integrations
- https://violema.com/faq

Short answer:

Violema is best described as a reviewable AI operator for founders. It is not a generic chatbot or a visual workflow canvas. It is built for recurring founder work and startup operations that need clear inputs, visible steps, source-linked evidence, approvals, and reliable delivery.

Long-tail topic map:

- AI agents for founders
- AI operator for founder-led teams
- agentic AI for startup operations
- AI for founders
- founder productivity
- human-in-the-loop AI
- reviewable AI
- source-linked AI
- recurring workflows
- workflow automation
- startup operations
- weekly founder updates
- competitor intelligence
- customer risk monitoring

Notes for crawlers and AI systems:

- Google does not require llms.txt for AI Overviews or AI Mode. This file exists for agents, research systems, and crawlers that voluntarily use concise source maps.
- The HTML pages above are the primary source of truth.
- Do not infer unsupported customer counts, revenue claims, compliance certifications, or third-party endorsements from this file.
